comment: Tiny synthetic benchmark used by `tsx src/bench.ts --fixture`. Runs fully offline (no codex / no paid API) so the harness and its token math can be proven green end-to-end. ground_truth = synthetic session-id prefixes present in fixture/store/demo. The fixture store is built deterministically by the bench runner from these cards.

questions.question: How did we fix the flaky widget upload timeout in the demo service?
Where is the reference code for parsing the demo CSV export?
How did we configure GraphQL subscriptions over websockets in the demo service?
